Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}What's this? It appears to be a rubber duck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}So there really wasn't anything there, huh. Sorry, I guess I was wrong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Is it just me, or is the water a little too hot? I'm getting kind of lightheaded...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Yamagishi appears to be stripped of her abilities when stripped of her clothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}How intriguing. Each individual human body has its own distinct characteristics.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 154 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Okay, that's plenty, Aigis. Let's go, I'll treat you to some ice cream.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Ice cream? That's a highly efficient way to cool down.[n]{f 1 1}
